name: Cole Slaw Dressing, Joyce's
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Celery seed or celery salt
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the vinegar, vegetable oil, sugar, celery seed (or celery salt), and bring to a boil over medium heat.
2. Remove from heat and whisk in the Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper until well combined.
3. Refrigerate the dressing. It is very good and can also be made using the microwave method.
